screen_metadata.name: Preventative Maintenance Scheduler & Machine Downtime Log

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px dense operational calendar workspace layout)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Two-Column Flexible Split Canvas (Left Sidebar Panel: High-Performance Analytics Block displaying MTBF/MTTR line charts and historical plant downtime breakdown sheets; Right Main Canvas: Interactive Chronological Matrix Calendar View tracking preventative maintenance cycles by month/week/day tracks; Top Contextual Ribbon: Active Factory Uptime Metric Guages & Urgent Out-of-Spec Overdue Service Bars)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Renders concurrent graphical downtime charts and wide monthly scheduling grids side-by-side flawlessly)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The analytical chart block collapses down into a sliding lower drawer to allocate maximum screen area for wide chronological calendar columns)

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active maintenance planner or asset coordinator clearance keys -> Inherit multi-tenant facility isolation scopes -> Execute state payload request fetch from AssetManagementService.getPreventativeSchedules()
user_progression_routes.on_calendar_date_click: Asynchronously filter and populate the analytics pane with machine logs, expected downtimes durations, and engineer assignment lists for that timeframe

redirection_rules.condition: If a critical factory production line's compiled preventative maintenance countdown parameter lapses past its zero tolerance bound
redirection_rules.action: Flash an immediate blinking orange outer glow on the calendar cell block, flag status tokens inline to 'OVERDUE - RISK BLOCK ACTIVE', and inject a priority service task entry straight into the SCM procurement track for spare parts kitting verification

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User double-clicks an empty calendar cell coordinate or clicks action controller 'btn_create_schedule'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop center dialog validation form wizard capturing machine identifier keys from PLM, required maintenance task instructions blocks, projected downtime intervals, and certified technician assignment selectors

atoms.type: Micro Circular Percent Graphic Gauge SVG Element

molecules.composition: Combines system asset tracking key (`eam_equipment_id`) + clear short text service instruction label + engineering priority color token sub-border lines + technician profile avatar dot variable
Combines metric classification title description + high-precision numeric value string (e.g., MTBF: 720h) + conditional contextual delta percentage label

organisms.composition: Analytical container layout housing visual vector chart blocks elements, historical machine availability rows matrices lists, and automated asset efficiency level calculations trackers panels.

High-performance two-dimensional chronological table layout grid linking calendar date coordinates cells directly to multiple instances blocks of calendar_matrix_event_capsule elements, complete with dynamic month shift toolbars loops.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Monospaced formatting typography stacks applied strictly to hour counters, MTTR values, device keys, and dates to preserve vertical alignment frames layouts tracking data sheets flawlessly)

scales.analytics_large_kpi_text: font-size: 1.5rem (24px) | font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace | font-weight: 800 | tracking: tight

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid Frame)
color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Workspace Layer Container)
color_palette_hex.schedule_normal_indigo: #4F46E5 (Indigo Blue Preventative Run Operational Focus Hue Accent)
color_palette_hex.schedule_breach_orange: #D97706 (Amber Orange Overdue Milestone Exception Warning Line Indicator)
color_palette_hex.calendar_grid_borders: #334155 (Slate Charcoal Clean Hard Geometric Framework Calendar Partitions Lines)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px standard component catalog dashboard layout frame margins padding unit metrics)
spacing_and_borders.calendar_cell_min_height: 6.5rem (104px spatial cell bounding box ensuring room for multi-event listings stacks layouts rows)
spacing_and_borders.border_style_token: 1px solid #334155 (Slate Matrix Border Alignment Configuration Component Partition Separators)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: transform micro-scale translation shifts layer upward translateY(-1px); box-shadow updates properties to thin intense outer line highlight using color #3B82F6 over an 80ms execution curve window
opacity values parameters adjustments modifier scale drops to 0.60; cursor attributes modify instantly to value type 'move'

accessibility_aria_roles.preventative_scheduling_calendar_matrix_: role='grid' utilizing internal row designations mapping weeks coordinates directly to day columns tracking focus criteria variables schemas maps
accessibility_aria_roles.plant_reliability_analytics_dashboard: role='region' accompanied by explicit aria-live='polite' configuration fields monitoring live engineering charts modifications updates fields parameters

preventative_maintenance_schedules_colle.task_instructions_summary: Execute precision laser sensor alignment validation tests tracking guidelines parameters, flushing metrology logs data sheets straight into QMS core databases filters.

local_reactive_state_variables.active_calendar_date_coordinate_id: Tracks currently focused calendar day target string cell index used to hydrate detailed sidebar lists profiles templates grids views (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_scheduling_modal_visible: Boolean state variable tracking presentation configurations parameters toggling alternative preventative maintenance cycle creation form wizard overlays
local_reactive_state_variables.calendar_month_focus_index: Alphanumeric timestamp context variable tracking active active date month window views (initialized to '2026-06' default state variable tracking tracker parameter code)

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared application instance session multi-tenant company context parameters tracking codes configurations cross microservice runtime execution scopes
global_application_context_bindings.mfg_active_floor_workorders_buffer: Global storage transaction queue data bus caching active manufacturing run constraints metrics locally to allow maintenance planners to identify empty shop-floor time brackets window openings flawlessly

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 presentation layers combined with standard Tailwind CSS utility grid structures writing layout variables logic natively via modern ES6 client-side asynchronous recursive loop module scripts parsing custom styling definitions without external third-party chart plugins layouts code compilation scripts dependencies layers requirements
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Shifting calendar month scopes views grids or recalculating full trend lines elements paths charts following date switches triggers must evaluate matrix operations calculations adjustments lines under a target execution runtime threshold boundary parameter limit of 14ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Pass selected index mapping reference directly into local active_calendar_date_coordinate_id state local tracker parameter code pointer variables to populate metrics sidebars containers sheets instantly

Mutate local state variable flag configuration is_scheduling_modal_visible tracker modifier parameter value to true to display layout system maintenance scheduler wizard panel overlays frames instantly

Broadcast workflow schedule instantiation token packets; append successfully generated record item parameters maps back inside preventative_maintenance_schedules_collection local display cache views arrays blocks; trigger system closures over wizard fields layer elements

element_interaction_links.navigates_to_route: /logistics/suppliers (Complete absolute loop rotation cycle context; advance web layout router coordinates positions metrics all the way backward straight to initial starter blueprint anchor: SCM Screen SCM_SCR_001 Command Hub Viewport Layout Panel Frame View)
